description_long: This object represents a child pedestrian, depicted with a compact, youthful body shape and proportions typical of a young child. The figure features a rounded head, short limbs, and a slight torso, with subtle anatomical details suggesting clothing and shoes. The surface is smooth and stylized, lacking fine facial or garment details, and the form is simplified for clarity and recognizability in urban environments. The exterior is primarily composed of two main color regions, with a clear separation between the upper and lower body, likely indicating different clothing items. The object appears solid and robust, with no visible accessories such as bags or hats. The overall design is intended for easy identification as a child in street or sidewalk scenarios.
description: A stylized, solid figure of a young child pedestrian with simplified features and distinct upper and lower body regions, suitable for urban scenes.
description_view_0: This view shows the upper body and head, highlighting the smooth, rounded contours and the transition between the torso and shoulders.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the side of the torso and the separation between the upper and lower body, with a clear view of the arm and hip area.
description_view_2: The back and side of the figure are visible, showing the broadest part of the shoulders and the tapering shape toward the waist.
description_view_3: This view presents the lower body and legs, with a focus on the elongated form and the base of the figure, suggesting footwear.
